heading: Retail food store and recipient trafficking
label: 2036b Retail food store and recipient trafficking

children.heading: Purpose
children.label: a Purpose
children.text: The purpose of this section is to provide the Department of Agriculture with additional resources to prevent trafficking in violation of this chapter by strengthening recipient and retail food store program integrity.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Additional funds are provided under this section to supplement the retail food store and recipient integrity activities of the Department.

children.heading: Information technologies
children.label: 2 Information technologies
children.text: The Secretary shall use an appropriate amount of the funds provided under this section to employ information technologies known as data mining and data warehousing and other available information technologies to administer the supplemental nutrition assistance program and enforce regulations promulgated under .section 2013(c) of this title

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: 1 Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $5,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2014 through 2023.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Out of any funds in the Treasury not otherwise appropriated, the Secretary of the Treasury shall transfer to the Secretary to carry out this section not less than $15,000,000 for fiscal year 2014, to remain available until expended.

children.heading: Receipt and acceptance
children.label: B Receipt and acceptance
children.text: The Secretary shall be entitled to receive, shall accept, and shall use to carry out this section the funds transferred under subparagraph (A), without further appropriation.

children.heading: Maintenance of funding
children.label: C Maintenance of funding
children.text: The funding provided under subparagraph (A) shall supplement (and not supplant) other Federal funding for programs carried out under this chapter.
